ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created. */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post. */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook). */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user who posted it. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user who posted it. */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user who posted it is verified. */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's profile description. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the post. */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the post for easy reference. */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., tweet, status update, photo post). */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post. */,
  "repost_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been reposted. */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any media (e.g., images, videos) attached to the post. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis. */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed. */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the post (-1 to 1). */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the post (0 to 1). */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (positive, negative, neutral). */,
  "neg" REAL /* Negative sentiment score. */,
  "neu" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score. */,
  "pos" REAL /* Positive sentiment score. */,
  "compound" REAL /* Compound sentiment score. */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis. */,
  "analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sentiment analysis was performed. */,
  "analyzer_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis tool used. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user. */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified. */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's profile description. */,
  "user_handle" TEXT /* Unique handle or username of the user. */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has. */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following. */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created. */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active. */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric. */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked. */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post. */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the post. */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the post. */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was viewed. */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate based on likes, comments, and shares. */,
  "engagement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement metrics were last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic. */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed. */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic extracted from the post. */,
  "topic_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the topic extraction. */,
  "topic_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the topic in posts. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity. */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed. */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity extracted from the post. */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, organization, location). */,
  "entity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the entity extraction. */,
  "entity_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the entity in posts. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend. */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic being tracked. */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag being tracked. */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the trend. */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend started. */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend ended. */,
  "trend_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trend. */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sentiments" (
  "user_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user sentiment. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user. */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post. */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the user towards the post. */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the user's sentiment. */,
  "sentiment_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sentiment was recorded. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sentiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sentiments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)
